section.heading: Compensation: Reserve on active duty accepting from any person

content.p: Any Reserve who, before being ordered to active duty, was receiving compensation from any person may, while he is on that duty, receive compensation from that person.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1662(g)(1), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 2995.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 1033 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(g)(2).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
